info.name: GoTyolo - Booking API
info.description: Booking, payment webhook, get and cancel. Base URL: http://localhost:5001/api. Set tripId, bookingId from responses.

request.description: Book seats on a trip. Set tripId to a PUBLISHED trip UUID. Copy returned id into bookingId for other requests.
Get a booking by ID. Set bookingId (e.g. from Create Booking). 200 with booking or 404 if not found.

Cancel CONFIRMED or PENDING_PAYMENT (before cutoff). CONFIRMED: call after Payment Webhook success. PENDING_PAYMENT: call after Create Booking, no webhook. 200: { cancelled: true, refund_amount }. 404 if not found. 409 if EXPIRED/CANCELLED or PENDING_PAYMENT after cutoff.
Simulate payment provider callback. Set bookingId. status: success|failed. Always returns 200.
Cancel before payment. Create Booking, set bookingId, then Cancel (do NOT call Payment Webhook). Expect 200, cancelled: true, refund_amount: 0. Seats released. Use trip with start_date far ahead.
